raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "performative declaration of surrender and commitment to a subjectively understood higher power",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a God or higher power exists that can receive and care for human will and life",
    "human will and life are transferable to that higher power through intentional decision",
    "personal understanding of God is sufficient and authoritative for the transaction",
    "such surrender produces beneficial care or guidance"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within a theistic framework that allows subjective conceptions of divinity and posits interactive divine care",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "a responsive higher power exists, surrender reliably yields psychological or spiritual benefit, and the decision is made freely without coercion",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such higher power exists, the act of surrender produces passivity or harm, or the phrase masks avoidance of personal agency"
}
